infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow PROXI to access your camera to take photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow PROXI to access your microphone for video recording.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow PROXI to access your photos to share them.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow PROXI to access your location to share it in chat.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow access to FaceID for secure authentication.
